task_context.actionable_question: Am I getting better or worse over time?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Identify trend direction, assessments below pass/target thresholds, and the concrete recommended_action for the weakest recent assessment.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your performance has improved significantly from Assessment 1 to Assessment 3, moving from a score of 0 to 55. This shows a positive trend in your understanding of the material, although there is still room for improvement to reach your target score.

Insights: Significant Improvement: You increased your score from 0 in Assessment 1 to 55 in Assessment 3, indicating a strong upward trend in your performance. | Initial Struggles: In Assessment 1, you scored 0, which is below both the pass and target thresholds, indicating a need for urgent support. | Consistent Performance: Your score of 55 in both Assessments 2 and 3 shows consistency, but it remains below the target threshold of 70.

Educational implications: You have made progress, but you still need to focus on improving your understanding to reach your target score.

Recommendations: high - Review Assessment 1 with tutor support to focus on missed core concepts. - This will help you build a stronger foundation and improve your performance in future assessments. | medium - Practice similar questions and review feedback from Assessments 2 and 3. - This will help you move from pass-level to target-level performance.

explanation.summary: Your performance has improved significantly from Assessment 1 to Assessment 3, moving from a score of 0 to 55. This shows a positive trend in your understanding of the material, although there is still room for improvement to reach your target score.

insights.title: Significant Improvement
insights.description: You increased your score from 0 in Assessment 1 to 55 in Assessment 3, indicating a strong upward trend in your performance.

insights.title: Initial Struggles
insights.description: In Assessment 1, you scored 0, which is below both the pass and target thresholds, indicating a need for urgent support.

insights.title: Consistent Performance
insights.description: Your score of 55 in both Assessments 2 and 3 shows consistency, but it remains below the target threshold of 70.

educational_implications: You have made progress, but you still need to focus on improving your understanding to reach your target score.

recommendations.action: Review Assessment 1 with tutor support to focus on missed core concepts.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you build a stronger foundation and improve your performance in future assessments.

recommendations.action: Practice similar questions and review feedback from Assessments 2 and 3.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you move from pass-level to target-level performance.

confidence.reason: The data quality is strong with a large sample size of 649 students across 3 assessments.

task_output_contract: Identify timing, first/last points, overall change, and flagged points when supplied.
For empty or insufficient data, state row count and missing capability/data-quality warnings instead of inferring a trend.
Only recommend timing when critical weeks or action_evidence are present.
v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (3.4045 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

required_core_outputs.description: Identify the observed score trend direction.
Identify assessments below returned pass or target thresholds.

required_supporting_outputs.description: Provide recommended_action for the weakest recent assessment only when that field is present.

evaluation_constraints.description: If fewer than 3 assessment data points are available, state that evidence is insufficient for a reliable trend rather than asserting a stable direction.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
